dbEquipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat, you gain 650 Combat Advantage, to the max of 7800.

dbEquipBonuses.description: When Action Points are less than 80%, your Accuracy is increased. +5% while outside of the Pirates' Skyhold or the Dread Sanctum. +10% while inside of the Pirates' Skyhold or the Dread Sanctum.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Gladiator's Focus
dbEquipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat, you gain 100 Critical Strike. If you stay in combat for longer than 2 minutes, this ability will no longer be active.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Survivor's Finesse
dbEquipBonuses.description: When your health is 50% or more, your Critical Severity is increased by 10,000. When your health is below 50%, Movement Speed is increased by 20%.

dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 200 Critical Strike for each enemy you are engaged in battle. (Max of 15 targets)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Wanderer's Vigor
dbEquipBonuses.description: When not in a party, you regenerate 3% of your Maximum Hit Points, up to 3000, every 3 seconds.
